diff -urN /usr/ports/textproc/p5-XML-Parser-Style-Elemental/Makefile textproc/p5-XML-Parser-Style-Elemental/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/textproc/p5-XML-Parser-Style-Elemental/Makefile	2012-11-08 07:58:46.000000000 +0900
+++ textproc/p5-XML-Parser-Style-Elemental/Makefile	2013-05-14 00:00:25.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,13 +1,11 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-XML-Parser-Style-Elemental
-# Date created:				2004-05-23
-# Whom:					arved
-#
+# Created by: arved
 # $FreeBSD: head/textproc/p5-XML-Parser-Style-Elemental/Makefile 300897 2012-07-14 14:29:18Z beat $
 
 PORTNAME=	XML-Parser-Style-Elemental
 PORTVERSION=	0.50
 CATEGORIES=	textproc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:TIMA
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
